3015716.title: SpongeBob
3015716.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3015794.title: SpongeBob
3015794.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3015867.title: SpongeBob
3015867.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3016700.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3016700.description: Dave can't help but notice that his Chipmunks are growing up and becoming independent. Anxious to spend more time with them, he only ends up suffocating them. In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend.

3016724.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3016724.description: While Dave is working on an important new song, the Chipmunks are upstairs making a mess of their bedroom. Dave orders them to clean their room. But in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song. Can they fix it in time for the big performance?

3016766.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3016766.description: When Dave refuses to let Alvin get a dangerous toy sports car, Alvin secretly convinces Simon to build him an exact replica of the car. Will Alvin be able to keep this secret from Dave? Or will it turn out that the toy car is TOO FAST - TOO FURIOUS?!

3016804.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3016804.description: A little girl loses her doll at the zoo, and Rico gives up his own doll to replace it. Private assures Rico that his good deed will come back to him. / When a raccoon shows up and starts stealing from the zoo animals, the penguins jump into action.

3017577.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3017577.description: Julien is horrified when the baboons' dance routine gets more attention than his own. His attempts to sabotage the baboons blow up in his face. / There's a blackout and Julien convinces everyone they should revert to "jungle law" with him as king.

3017637.title: The Loud House
3017637.description: Convinced that their scrapbook isn't good enough for Dad's birthday, the Loud kids seek out the perfect gift. // Lily hears the parents mention ice cream if the kids are good, so she uses baby smarts to avert sibling disasters

3017722.title: The Loud House
3017722.description: Lori takes a waitressing job at Dad's restaurant, but it turns out that serving is harder than she anticipated. // Spurred on by a classmate's mocking about Charles, Lana decides to train him to compete in a local dog show.

3018572.title: De Casagrandes
3018572.description: When they find a treasure map, the Casagrandes go on a wild search for Pancho Villa's gold. // Frida and Carlos go on a fancy plane ride, but Carl and CJ try to sneak on for an adventure of their own.

3018653.title: De Casagrandes
3018653.description: When Ronnie Anne finds out her Tio Carlos was a famous skateboarder, she begs him to teach her some new moves. // In order to buy a new skateboard, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business that quickly gets out of hand.

3018728.title: SpongeBob
3018728.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3019558.title: SpongeBob
3019558.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3019591.title: SpongeBob
3019591.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3019675.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3019675.description: Feeling that being Captain Man is too much work for just one person, Ray and Schwoz hatch the perfect plan: clone Ray.

3019703.title: Breadwinners
3019703.description: When SwaySway and Buhdeuce are trapped in a cave of stale bread by a ferocious Tunnel Eater, the guys pass the time by reminiscing about how they first met and became best baps for life.

3020547.title: Dorg van Dango
3020547.description: Sick of caring for Fretta's favorite flower, Dorg and the gang cast a spell to keep it out of their hair. // Dorg wants to win the top prize for selling Adventure Club cookies.

3020613.title: Sanjay & Craig
3020613.description: When Chicken Chuck adds his own sauce to Penny's hot wings, a heated competition erupts between the longtime friends. // The kids go on a quest to find a legendary pool in the forest.

3020715.title: Sanjay & Craig
3020715.description: Sanjay and Craig realize that only by taking off their shirts can they experience the ecstasy of total freedom. // Craig helps Sanjay overcome his fear of embarrassment and reveal his goofy middle name.

3020778.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3020778.description: Mort is exposed to Kowalski's super-ray, and he grows super-big and strong. / Marlene gets a new roommate! At first, she's excited to have a new best friend. But her attitude changes when her roommate turns out to have some pretty disgusting habits.

3021591.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3021591.description: The penguins compete against the lemurs in a game of capture the flag.

3021656.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3021656.description: The team discovers a Kraang ship buried under April's house where they find... April's Mom! But as April reconnects with her lost mother, is she really all that she seems?

3021705.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3021705.description: An upset Mikey runs away from home and befriends a Mutant Frog in the woods. When he learns its Frog family plans to attack the human world, he has to figure out a way to stop them.

3022539.title: Ollie's Pack
3022539.description: Major Snooch comes out of the pack to test Ollie as the Chosen One and evaluate CW as a guardian. // Ollie pulls rocker monsters out of the pack for Battle of The Bands, attracting Andre and Bev

3022632.title: SpongeBob
3022632.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3022712.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3022712.description: When Po is asked to bring a young princess to the King of the Qidan to make a peace offering, they learn that an agreement between the two kingdoms will come at a cost.

3022772.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3022772.description: After the Croc Bandits steal Shifu's favorite ruby-encrusted statue of Oogway from Po and Tigress, the two warriors must team up to get the statue back and return it home.

3023612.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3023612.description: While Dave is working on an important new song, the Chipmunks are upstairs making a mess of their bedroom. Dave orders them to clean their room. But in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song. Can they fix it in time for the big performance?

3023652.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3023652.description: When Dave refuses to let Alvin get a dangerous toy sports car, Alvin secretly convinces Simon to build him an exact replica of the car. Will Alvin be able to keep this secret from Dave? Or will it turn out that the toy car is TOO FAST - TOO FURIOUS?!

3023679.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3023679.description: Alvin must pass a manners course before he gets his dream meeting with the beautiful Princess of England! Problem is, he has to convince Brittany he's worthy.

3023717.title: SpongeBob
3023717.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3024545.title: SpongeBob
3024545.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3024626.title: De Casagrandes
3024626.description: Bobby struggles to give up control of the mercado during his pizza-versary date with Lori. // When Ronnie Anne notices that she's the only person Carlitos won't copy, she's determined to change it!

3024731.title: The Loud House
3024731.description: Lincoln has to get to school on time but getting his sisters out the door proves to be the biggest obstacle of all. // Lincoln is the deciding vote on going to the beach or the amusement park for their family vacation.

3025540.title: The Loud House
3025540.description: The older sisters reluctantly let Lynn into their babysitting club but she quickly proves to be too aggressive.

3025570.title: Hier is Pony
3025570.description: When pets are banned from the building, Annie and Pony have to convince the landlord to reconsider. // When the dog from next door, Pony's sworn enemy, comes to stay with them, Annie needs to find a way to make them get along.

3025640.title: SpongeBob
3025640.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3025735.title: SpongeBob
3025735.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3026562.title: SpongeBob
3026562.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3026662.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3026662.description: Donatello and April investigate a scientist's disappearance, but discover a conspiracy regarding a bizarre psychic monkey instead.

3026742.title: The Loud House
3026742.description: Lincoln signs his family up for a talent show and they form a band. // It's Dad's annual Take Your Daughter to Work Day so Mom offers to take Lincoln to her work: a dental office.

3027404.title: Huize Herrie
3027404.description: Every April Fool's Day, Luan pranks the entire household, but this year, Lincoln has a plan to not get pranked. // The Loud kids make a trip to the supermarket to do the grocery shopping for Mom, but Lincoln has other plans.

3027499.title: De Casagrandes
3027499.description: The Changs go on vacation and leave Ronnie Anne and her cousins to watch after Cam, the chameleon snake. // Ronnie Anne and her skate buddies work together to show their coach that they have what it takes to make a team.

3027581.title: SpongeBob
3027581.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3028390.title: SpongeBob
3028390.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3028502.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
3028502.description: The gang find Iroh with June's help. Iroh suggests that Zuko challenge Azula for the position of Fire Lord, with Katara to help. The others decide to intercept the airship fleet.

3028595.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
3028595.description: Sokka, Toph and Suki begin destroying the airship fleet. Aang duels Ozai, but is soon overwhelmed because of his reluctance to kill him.

3029439.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3029439.description: After what seems like forever, Mom and Dad have finally gotten hip to the fact that Timmy has fairy godparents. The question now is: how long can they keep Jorgen in the dark so that he won't take Wanda, Cosmo and Poof away forever?

3029510.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3029510.description: Timmy gets Jorgen fired. He helps Jorgen find a new job.

3029543.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3029543.description: When Shifu's con-man father comes back into town, Po finds himself in the middle.

3029605.title: Ollie's Pack
3029605.description: After a series of locker vandalism, Ollie becomes hall monitor and summons a sheriff monster from the pack. // While Ollie is out of commission with a swollen ankle, Pyper takes on the job of Chosen One.

3030197.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3030197.description: Alvin is convinced that Julie and her son are trying to move into their home and tries a variety of ways to stop the invasion.

3030234.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3030234.description: Theodore's new talking-teddy bear is driving Alvin and Simon nuts. So, they decide to rewire the bear's hard drive, so the bear will follow their directions! But when Alvin abuses the privilege, Simon turns the tables on him.

3030268.title: Huize Herrie
3030268.description: When Lincoln wants to watch the finale of his favorite show, he has to beat each sister to get to the couch first! // After Lincoln leaves a scathing voicemail on Lori's phone, he realizes he has to erase it before Lori hears it.

3030335.title: De Casagrandes
3030335.description: Celebrity psychic Ernesto Estrella deems Great Lakes City to be bad luck and Abuela believes him!

3030415.title: SpongeBob
3030415.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.
